Items.Title: Norway 2026 Away Kit Debuted at 2026 World Cup
Items.Description: Yesterday, the Norway players debuted their new 2026 away kit on the World Cup stage.

Items.Title: 'On fire' Haaland sees Norway edge Senegal as Odegaard leads 'Viking row'
Items.Description: Erling Haaland's second-half double saw Norway beat Senegal 3-2 at a rain-swept MetLife Stadium as Stale Solbakken's side joined France in qualifying for the last 32 of the World Cup - performing a 'Viking row' to celebrate.
